intents.text: Extension command 'quit' conflicts with built-in commands error when loading shutdown-command extension.
Rename the extension command from 'quit' to 'shutdown' to avoid conflict with built-in commands.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: please fix call the command shutdown

intents.text: The shutdown command doesn't actually shut down the application.
The shutdown doesn't exit cleanly; it fails to shut down the TUI, causing garbled output.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: doesn't shut down the tui, so i get garbled output

intents.text: Reverted extension change; the clean shutdown fix must be implemented in the coding-agent package itself.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: this must be fixed in coding-agent

intents.text: Is it documented that shutdown waits until the agent finishes its current turn?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: this waits until the agent has stopped its current turn, is that documented?
